creator: graham_lillico@hotmail.com
text:
When running /usr/X11R6/bin/xfce_setup the .xsession and .Xclients files 
are created with #!/bin/bash, however bash is installed in /usr/local/bin, also xfce-3.8.6_1 does not require bash

Fix: 

edit /usr/X11R6/etc/xfce/xsession and /usr/X11R6/etc/xfce/Xclients
replacing 

#!/bin/bash 

with 

#!/usr/local/bin/bash
How-To-Repeat: run /usr/X11R6/bin/xfce_setup
